name: one-system-cas-angular-example
description: Minimal Angular sample app demonstrating the One System CAS client SDK (@cas-system/angular-cas-client) with a tiny Express backend for server-to-server token validation

scripts.// --- dev ---: Run the Express backend (validate + static host) and the Angular dev server together

comment: The CAS SDK is referenced locally via the file: dependency below AND a tsconfig path mapping (see tsconfig.json). The package's main/types point at raw TypeScript (src/index.ts), so Angular compiles it from source.
